name: pm-pack
description: Product management workflows: discovery, strategy, PRD writing, launch planning, north star definition.
author: Agent Swarm

skills.name: MarketDiscovery
skills.principle: Identify unmet needs, market gaps, and emerging trends. Use Jobs-to-be-Done framework.
skills.when_to_apply: discovery, market, opportunity, unmet need, JTBD, emerging

skills.name: PositioningStrategy
skills.principle: Define target audience, value proposition, and competitive positioning. Use positioning canvas.
skills.when_to_apply: positioning, strategy, value proposition, target audience, differentiation

skills.name: PRDWriter
skills.principle: Write structured PRD with problem statement, goals, non-goals, requirements, success metrics, and timeline.
skills.when_to_apply: PRD, requirements, specification, product document, feature spec

skills.name: LaunchPlanner
skills.principle: Create launch plan with timeline, channels, messaging, success criteria, and risk mitigation.
skills.when_to_apply: launch, go-to-market, GTM, release, announcement, rollout

skills.name: NorthStarDefiner
skills.principle: Define north star metric, input metrics, and measurement framework. Align team around single outcome.
skills.when_to_apply: north star, metric, KPI, OKR, measurement, outcome, alignment

ontology_terms.label: Discovery
ontology_terms.definition: Explore market opportunities and unmet needs

ontology_terms.label: Positioning
ontology_terms.definition: Define competitive positioning and value proposition

ontology_terms.label: Launch Plan
ontology_terms.definition: Go-to-market timeline, channels, and success criteria

competency_questions: What market opportunities exist for this product?
How should we position against competitors?
What requirements belong in the PRD?
